articles.title: X (Twitter) Obtains License To Store, Transfer, And Trade Bitcoin And Crypto
articles.description: This license also includes related service providers, such as wallets, payment processors, and exchanges.

articles.title: Massive Whale Trades 10.000 Ethereum After Grayscale Wins the Lawsuit
articles.description: A huge cryptocurrency whale made heavy transactions after the Grayscale lawsuit decision was announced, according to onchain data. Continue Reading: Massive Whale Trades 10.000 Ethereum After Grayscale Wins the Lawsuit

articles.title: BREAKING: Grayscale Triumph: SEC Crushed, GBTC Rockets Towards ETF, Bitcoin Targets $28,000
articles.description: In a significant turn of events for Bitcoin (BTC) and the overall market, cryptocurrency asset manager Grayscale has emerged victorious in its legal battle against the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The U.S. District of Columbia Court of Appeals has ruled in favor of Grayscale, overturning the SEC’s lawsuit and potentially bringing the company one step closer to achieving Bitcoin Spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) status. Bitcoin Surges As Grayscale’s Legal Victory Boosts Market Sen

articles.title: Securitize tokenizes U.S. Treasury Bond yield fund for accredited investors
articles.description: The finance asset marketplace Tradeteq is launching a U.S. Treasury Bond token on the XDC network.

articles.title: BREAKING: Decision Made in Grayscale-SEC Case, Grayscale Wins the Case!
articles.description: The judge has finally made his decision in the highly followed Bitcoin Spot ETF case between Grayscale and the SEC. Continue Reading: BREAKING: Decision Made in Grayscale-SEC Case, Grayscale Wins the Case!
